info.p1a: You can set a time to receive a daily reminder email.
info.p1b: You must check the checkbox below and save your preferences to begin receiving emails.
info.p2a: If you no longer wish to receive these emails, simply uncheck the box below and save your preferences.
info.p2b: You can also click the "unsubscribe" link in an email to opt out.

form.i_want_to_receive_a_daily_reminder_email: I want to receive a daily reminder email.

messaging.please_choose_a_time: Please choose a time to receive a reminder
